category_sources: Official protobuf-javascript README says protoc-gen-js can be installed as @protocolbuffers/protoc-gen-js.
source_facts.description says this is the Protocol Buffers JavaScript generator plugin.
display_name_sources: Official protobuf-javascript README names the plugin protoc-gen-js.
docs_sources: Official Protocol Buffers JavaScript generated-code reference documents generated JavaScript output.
Official protobuf-javascript README documents the JavaScript runtime and protoc-gen-js plugin status.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf-javascript, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official protobuf-javascript README describes JavaScript Protocol Buffers usage and protoc-gen-js.
source_facts.description identifies a JavaScript Protocol Buffers generator plugin.
